summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Zurix Sciences E-commerce platform. All backend API tests (19/19) passed. All frontend UI tests passed including homepage, products catalog (49 products), product detail, cart functionality, checkout flow, product verification (valid/invalid codes), dosage calculator, representatives page (3 reps), and contact form.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form only logs to console - no backend endpoint (as per requirements, this is expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing 49 products and 3 representatives seeded in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs: /api/products (with filters), /api/categories, /api/product-types, /api/representatives, /api/verify-product all tested and passing. Frontend: Homepage (hero, categories, featured products), Products (49 items with search/filter/sort), Product Detail (specs, add to cart), Cart Drawer (open/close, quantity, checkout), Checkout (rep selection, WhatsApp), Verify (valid/invalid codes), Calculator (concentration/doses), Representatives (3 reps with WhatsApp), Contact (form submits to console). WhatsApp numbers are placeholder values.

homepage.categories_section: PASS - 4 categories (GLP-1 Analogs, Research Peptides, Cognitive Enhancers, Coenzymes)

product_detail.product_info: PASS - name, price, category, purity, dosage

calculator.inputs: PASS - vial mg, water ml, desired dose

representatives.rep_details: PASS - Paraguay (Carlos Rodriguez), United States (Michael Johnson), Hong Kong (Wei Chen)

contact.submit: PASS - logs to console, shows success message

navigation.navbar_links: PASS - Home, Products, Calculator, Verify Product, Representatives, Contact

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/products/code/{verification_code} - Get product by verification code
